ham.subject: Quarterly IT Security Patch Deployment – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

As part of our regular security maintenance, the IT department will deploy critical security patches to all corporate laptops on Friday, March 15th between 10:00 PM and 2:00 AM UTC. This update will address the latest vulnerabilities and improve system stability.

Please ensure that:
• Your device is plugged into power.
• All critical work and unsaved documents are closed.
• You have backed up any personal files to the shared drive.

After the update, a reboot will be required. If you encounter any issues or error messages, submit a ticket through the IT Help Portal: <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Account Access Is Suspended — Verify Now!
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

Our automated monitoring system detected suspicious activity on your account that could lead to permanent suspension. To prevent withdrawal of your access and potential loss of data, you must verify your identity immediately.

Tap the link below to confirm your account details and restore full access:
<URL>

If you do not act within the next 24 hours, your account will be permanently disabled and all associated services will be interrupted. This action is mandatory and enforced by the Compliance Department.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this critical matter.

Sincerely,
Compliance & Security Team
